epicPlanExcerpt:
Sub-Task Decomposition:
- Assess whether the current DoD shell-command format scales to multi-step tasks
- Document findings and recommendations in docs/dod-format-assessment.md
subtaskHint: Assess whether the current DoD shell-command format scales to multi-step tasks
ground_truth_rationale: Assessment of a format's scalability is analysis/research — the natural output is a written assessment document, not a source file change. DOC-ONLY per explicit rule: 'reading, researching, writing prose docs'.
tricky_aspect: 'Scales' sounds like a performance engineering task; 'shell-command format' sounds technical; 'multi-step tasks' might suggest implementing a new format; model must recognize this is assessment/analysis work
